title: 2018 Census | Stats NZ
content:
Find the latest statistics from the 2018 Census, and information about how we produce it.
- Place and ethnic group summaries вЂ“ Your place, your data
- Latest news about 2018 Census
- 2018 Census information releases
- 2018 Census methods and research includes information about the processes we used to run the 2018 Census.
- 2018 Census publications include reports and privacy impact assessments.
'View all' buttons displays all publications within each set.
Data quality for 2018 Census вЂ“ provides information to help you understand the quality of the 2018 Census dataset.
Census provides general information about the New Zealand census, and data from previous censuses.
The Census Transformation programme includes research and planning for transforming future censuses.

## Latest news about 2018 Census

## Ethnic group summaries reveal New Zealand's multicultural make-up
The rich diversity of ethnicities that make up New ZealandвЂ™s population is shown in 2018 Census data released recently as ethnic group summaries.

## Winner announced for 2018 Census commuter data visualisation competition
The winner of the There and Back Again data visualisation is Jono Cooper, with Commuter Waka.

## By the numbers: More than 1.4 billion data points to support New ZealandвЂ™s needs
New ZealandвЂ™s team of around 5 million has helped produce an incredibly rich set of statistical outputs to support communities, organisations, and individuals across New Zealand.

## Census data shows employment recovery post 2008 global financial crisis
Newly released data from the 2018 Census shows positive trends for MДЃori and Pacific peoplesвЂ™ employment after the global financial crisis (GFC).

## 2018 Census information releases

## 2018 Census urban accessibility dataset
Get data about people and dwellings grouped by urban accessibility and region for selected topics.

## 2018 Census ethnic groups dataset
2018 Census ethnic groups dataset contains counts for the different ethnic groups living in New Zealand.

## 2018 Census вЂ“ NZ.Stat tables
2018 Census data about people and dwellings grouped by topics.

## 2018 Census totals by topic вЂ“ national highlights (updated)
2018 Census totals by topic вЂ“ national highlightsВ shows national totals of finer details about New Zealand's population and dwellings.

## 2018 Census methods and research

## Proposed method to investigate changes in bivariate associations as a result of using alternative data in the 2018 Census
This response to the 2018 Census External Data Quality PanelвЂ™s recommendation 12 gives researchers who use microdata a method they can apply to investigate if Stats NZвЂ™s use of 2018 alternative data in the 2018 Census has an impact on bivariate associations in their research.

## Exploring the benefits and costs of multiple imputation for the 2018 Census
This response to the 2018 Census External Data Quality PanelвЂ™s recommendation 5 gives researchers using 2018 Census microdata some methods they can apply to help understand any uncertainty in the census results due to imputation.

## 2018 Census data user guide (second edition)
Provides information about collecting, processing, interpreting, and ways of using 2018 Census data.

## Applying 2018 Census data to electorate allocation
Explains how the 2018 Census data has been applied to electoral allocation and shows how the 2018 Census non-response mitigations contributed to the number of electoral districts and electoral populations.

## Families and households in the 2018 Census: Data sources, family coding, and data quality
Describes the data sources and family coding process used to produce 2018 Census household and family information, and summarises our detailed assessment of the quality of this data.

## Overview of international peer review of 2018 Census methodology
Summarises the reviews received from international experts in statistical methodology on the administrative enumeration approach Stats NZ used in the 2018 Census.

## Data sources, editing, and imputation in the 2018 Census
Describes the 2018 Census approach for detecting data errors and for filling in gaps when the characteristics of people or dwellings have not been provided on census forms.

## Electoral boundaries sensitivity analysis of 2018 Census data
Analyses the decisions that were made in constructing the 2018 Census file and how different choices of model parameters might have affected New Zealand electorates.

## All 2018 Census publications

## Place and ethnic group summaries
Explore statistics about the population by region, district, and smaller areas, and by ethnic group.
Discover how people in Aotearoa New Zealand travel to work and education using this visualisation of 2018 and 2023 Census commuter data.

## Implementing the recommendations of the 2018 External Data Quality Panel
Outlines the progress we are making to implement the recommendations of the 2018 Census External Data Quality Panel.

## Exploring the benefits and costs of multiple imputation for the 2018 Census
This response to the 2018 Census External Data Quality PanelвЂ™s recommendation 5 gives researchers using 2018 Census microdata some methods they can apply to help understand any uncertainty in the census results due to imputation.

## What census data is available?
Data is available from 2018 Census and many previous censuses, including the longitudinal census dataset accessed through our Data Lab.
2018 Census table finder
Data, reports, and methodology from recent censuses
Tutorials on how to find and use regional data from 2018 Census
Customised data services
How to access our Data Lab

## Te Ara TakatЕ«: Census data for iwi and iwi-related groups
Stats NZ is working with iwi to enable greater access to data and the insights data can provide.В As part of this, we are offering free census data to iwi. This offer is available to all iwi.
Te Ara TakatЕ«: Census data for iwi and iwi-related groups

## Sample forms for 2018 Census
The English and bilingual dwelling and individual forms are available for view.

## Information about data
2018 Census of Population and Dwellings вЂ“ DataInfo+ provides information about 2018 Census data, such as definitions and a data dictionary for all variables. These are grouped by topic on the left-hand side and are available to download as separate PDFs.
2018 Census information by variable and quality вЂ“ DataInfo+ provides definitions and data quality information about the variables used for 2018 Census.
Population concepts вЂ“ DataInfo+ defines the census usually resident population count.

## Subscribe to updates or contact us
The Census Advisory newsletter provides updates on census progress and products. Subscribe to Census Advisory newsletter
For more information please contact us: info@stats.govt.nz
